Assembly
California Legislature

GERALD N. FELANDO
MEMBER, CALIFORNIA LEGISLATURE
FIFTY-FIRST ASSEMBLY DISTRICT

CHAIRMAN
REPUBLICAN CAUCUS

JUNE 23, 1992

MR WAYNE ORDOS
EXECUTIVE DIRECTOR
FPPC
428 J STREET, SUITE 800
SACRAMENTO, CA.  95814

DEAR MR. ORDOS

     THIS IS IN REFERENCE TO A TELEPHONE CONVERSATION YOU HAD
RECENTLY WITH MY HUSBAND, GERALD FELANDO. THE SUBJECT MATTER
OF THAT CONVERSATION WAS THE FPPC GUIDELINE OF ONE CHECKING
ACCOUNT PER ELECTION. SINCE WE ARE CURRENTLY UNHAPPY WITH
THE EXISTING BANKING INSTITUTION, WE WOULD LIKE TO OPEN
A NEW ACCOUNT AT ANOTHER BANK. WE ARE ASKING PERMISSION FROM
THE FPPC FOR A SIXTY DAY OVERLAP PERIOD OF TWO ACCOUNTS.
THIS WILL ENABLE US TO MAKE THE TRANSITION FEASIBLE.
     ALSO, ANOTHER ISSUE I ASK THE FPPC TO ADDRESS IS THE
PERMISSION FOR FRIENDS FOR FELANDO CAMPAIGN TO USE THE
ENCLOSED FORMAT. I UNDERSTAND IT HAS BEEN APPROVED. HOWEVER,
EACH INDIVIDUAL CAMPAIGN SHOULD RECEIVE PERMISSION TO USE
THE FORMAT.
     YOUR ATTENTION IN THESE MATTERS IS MOST APPRECIATED.

                                        SINCERELY YOURS,

                                        [signature]
                                        JOYCE ANN FELANDO, TREASURER FOR
                                        FRIENDS FOR FELANDO
                                        ID# 781098




Not printed or mailed at taxpayer expense.

Summary Page

embedding.qa_text: **Assembly California Legislature** GERALD N. FELANDO MEMBER, CALIFORNIA LEGISLATURE FIFTY-FIRST ASSEMBLY DISTRICT CHAIRMAN REPUBLICAN CAUCUS JUNE 23, 1992 MR WAYNE ORDOS EXECUTIVE DIRECTOR FPPC 428 J STREET, SUITE 800 SACRAMENTO, CA. 95814 DEAR MR. ORDOS, THIS IS IN REFERENCE TO A TELEPHONE CONVERSATION YOU HAD RECENTLY WITH MY HUSBAND, GERALD FELANDO. THE SUBJECT MATTER OF THAT CONVERSATION WAS THE FPPC GUIDELINE OF ONE CHECKING ACCOUNT PER ELECTION. SINCE WE ARE CURRENTLY UNHAPPY WITH THE EXISTING BANKING INSTITUTION, WE WOULD LIKE TO OPEN A NEW ACCOUNT AT ANOTHER BANK. WE ARE ASKING PERMISSION FROM THE FPPC FOR A SIXTY DAY OVERLAP PERIOD OF TWO ACCOUNTS. THIS WILL ENABLE US TO MAKE THE TRANSITION FEASIBLE. ALSO, ANOTHER ISSUE I ASK THE FPPC TO ADDRESS IS THE PERMISSION FOR THE FRIENDS FOR FELANDO CAMPAIGN TO USE THE ENCLOSED FORMAT. I UNDERSTAND IT HAS BEEN APPROVED. HOWEVER, EACH INDIVIDUAL CAMPAIGN SHOULD RECEIVE PERMISSION TO USE THE FORMAT. YOUR ATTENTION IN THESE MATTERS IS MOST APPRECIATED. SINCERELY YOURS, JOYCE ANN FELANDO, TREASURER FOR FRIENDS FOR FELANDO ID# 781098 This document is a financial summary page for a political campaign or committee, specifically for Assembly candidate Felando. The statement covers the period from January 1, 1992, through March 17, 1992. Here's a breakdown of the key sections and their contents: **Contributions Received:** | Column A | Column B | Column C | |----------|----------|----------| | Monetary Contributions | Schedule A, Line 3 $25201.00 | $0 | $25201.00 | | Loans Received | Schedule B, Line 7 $0 | $0 | $0 | | SUBTOTAL CASH CONTRIBUTIONS | Add Lines 1 + 2 $25201.00 | $0 | $25201.00 | | Non-monetary Contributions | Schedule C, Line 3 $0 | $0 | $0 | | SUBTOTAL CONTRIBUTIONS (Excluding Enforceable Promises) | Add Lines 3 + 4 $25201.00 | $0 | $25201.00 | | Enforceable Promises (Exclude Loan Guarantees, Line 18 below) | Schedule D, Line 7 $0 | $0 | $0 | | TOTAL CONTRIBUTIONS RECEIVED | Add Lines 5 + 6 $25201.00 | $0 | $25201.00 | **Expenditures Made:** | Column A | Column B | Column C | |----------|----------|----------| | Cash Payments (Other than Loans Made) | Schedule E, Line 5 $24188.87 | $0 | $24188.87 | | Loans Made | Schedule H, Line 7 $0 | $0 | $0 | | SUBTOTAL CASH PAYMENTS | Add Lines 8 + 9 $24188.87 | $0 | $24188.87 | | Accrued Expenses (Unpaid Bills) | Schedule F, Line 5 $0 | $0 | $0 | | TOTAL EXPENDITURES MADE | Add Lines 10 + 11 $24188.87 | $0 | $24188.87 | **Current Cash Statement:** | Column A | Column B | Column C | |----------|----------|----------| | Beginning Cash Balance | Previous Summary Page, Line 17 $49111.24 | | | | Cash Receipts | Column A, Line 3 above $25201.00 | | | | Miscellaneous Increases to Cash | Schedule I, Line 4 $1332.36 | | | | Cash Payments | Column A, Line 10 above $24188.87 | | |
